description: ffuf is a fast web fuzzer written in Go. The Python package is a thin wrapper.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/ffuf && python3 ffuf.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/ffuf && python3 ffuf.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/ffuf && python3 ffuf.py --help`. Fast web fuzzer (Go-based, also Python wrapper).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the recon category. Fits when the engagement needs: Fast web fuzzer (Go-based, also Python wrapper).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Fast web fuzzer (Go-based, also Python wrapper).

name: ffuf

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
